trends.label: real
trends.title: AI Agent 生态持续扩展
trends.text: 多 agent、工具调用、浏览器操作等方向正在从 demo 走向生产

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 视频生成竞赛加速
trends.text: 多家公司发布视频生成模型，质量和速度都在快速提升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AI 产品同质化严重
trends.text: 大量包装类 AI 产品涌现，核心差异化不足

trends.label: real
trends.title: 多模态成为标配
trends.text: 文本、图像、音频、视频的统一处理能力越来越普遍

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 监管政策收紧
trends.text: 全球多地出台 AI 相关法规，合规成本上升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AI 替代一切的叙事
trends.text: AI 在特定任务上表现优异，但通用替代仍需时间

cover.title: OrbitQuant: Data-Agnostic Quantization for Image and Video Diffusion Transformers
cover.summary: Diffusion transformers (DiTs) achieve state-of-the-art image and video generation, but their multi-step sampling and growing parameter count make inference expensive. Post-training quantization (PTQ)…
cover.why_it_matters: OrbitQuant 降低了视觉内容创作门槛，非设计师也能做出专业素材
cover.content_angle: 拿 OrbitQuant 生成一组作品截图，发帖「AI 做的图/视频能到什么水平了」

cover.title: AnyBokeh: Physics-Guided Any-to-Any Bokeh Editing with Optical Fingerprint Transfer
cover.summary: Depth-of-field control is a fundamental tool in photography, yet post-capture bokeh editing from a single image remains challenging. A practical editor should handle images captured under arbitrary…
cover.why_it_matters: AnyBokeh 是可以直接用的工具，能立刻提升你的工作效率
cover.content_angle: 实测 AnyBokeh 做一个具体任务，发帖「这个 AI 工具能帮你省多少时间」

cover.title: Measuring the Gap Between Human and LLM Research Ideas
cover.summary: LLMs are increasingly used to brainstorm research ideas, but existing evaluations mostly judge individual ideas by novelty, feasibility, or expert preference. We instead ask: how far are current…
cover.why_it_matters: Measuring the Gap Between… 提升了 AI 获取和使用外部知识的能力，准确率更高了
cover.content_angle: 用 Measuring the Gap Between… 搭一个简单知识库 demo，发帖「10 分钟搭建 AI 知识助手」

cover.title: Generated Contents Enrichment
cover.summary: We study Generated Contents Enrichment (GCE), a conditional image-generation task in which a sparse scene description is first enriched through an explicit scene representation and then rendered into…
cover.why_it_matters: Generated Contents Enrichment 代表了 AI 研究的最新方向，可能影响未来几个月的产品迭代
cover.content_angle: 用通俗语言解读 Generated Contents Enrichment，发帖「一句话看懂今天的 AI 论文」

cover.title: DataComp-VLM: Improved Open Datasets for Vision-Language Models
cover.summary: Building performant Vision-Language Models (VLMs) requires carefully curating large-scale training datasets, yet the community lacks systematic benchmarks for evaluating such curation strategies. We…
cover.why_it_matters: DataComp-VLM 让 AI 能同时处理文本、图像、语音，应用场景扩大了
cover.content_angle: 写 DataComp-VLM 的微调教程，发帖「手把手教你训练自己的 AI 模型」
